meaning: 瓦齐里斯坦[巴基斯坦西部一地区]
examples: Only those too poor to have left South Waziristan earlier are now coming out.
They also link up with groups based in the Waziristan region of Pakistan.
At least one security official in North Waziristan died in heavy firing from Afghanistan.
They testified that they had travelled to South Waziristan, Pakistan, with Medunjanin in 2008.
Like most residents of South Waziristan, Mr. Rehman fled the area before the 2009 offensive.
